violations.text: The ceiling in the kitchen area above the oven unit was observed to have replacement tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. The tiles are to be replaced with a proper smooth finished ceiling tile. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The ceiling tiles above the reach-in cooler were observed to be moved/opened. These areas must be sealed/closed/repaired to prevent the possible entry of pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
The table under the 3-bay sink was observed with rodent droppings. Area was cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The ceiling in the kitchen area above the oven unit was observed to have replacement tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. The tiles are to be replaced with a proper smooth finished ceiling tile. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

1) Holes/openings in the dry storage area were observed in the walls (bottom floor behind reach-in freezer unit, unused outlet above chest freezer). 2) The ceiling tiles above the reach-in cooler were observed to be moved/opened. These areas must be sealed/closed/repaired to prevent the possible entry of pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The following was observed: 1) Rodent droppings observed behind cooking equipment, shelving, and on storage bins. 2) The ceiling vents were observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The ceiling in the kitchen area above the oven unit was observed to have replacement tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. The tiles are to be replaced with a proper smooth finished ceiling tile. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Holes/openings in the dry storage area were observed in the walls (bottom floor behind reach-in freezer unit, unused outlet above chest freezer, around the pipes next to the grease trap). New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The following was observed: 1) Rodent droppings observed behind freezer units, under dry storage racks and behind cooking equipment. 2) The ceiling vents were observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

The ceiling tiles over the 2-door reach-in cooler in the kitchen area were observed to be missing. Per the PIC, the tiles were removed for better air flow above the refrigeration unit. Tiles to be replaced with a proper vented tile. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area above the oven unit was observed to have replacement tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. The tiles are to be replaced with a proper smooth finished ceiling tile. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The floros in the dry storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
